meaning: adj.(人)红发的,(鸟)红头的,急躁的
examples: You have your little redheaded girlfriend to thank for giving me this pleasure.
I'm pretty sure this is the only (natural) redheaded vampire I've seen at the movies.
Redheaded clowns will have all gotten into their tiny cars and driven away, never to return.
But the ancient Egyptians would also, it is said, ritually bury redheaded men alive.
Afterward in Ariel's Grotto, guests score one-on-one time with the redheaded mermaid herself as she poses for photos and signs autographs.
